# Let me check the transitions to see which actions had gameplay_changed=True
gameplay_changes = []

        gameplay_changes.append((i, t.action, t.result))

for i, action, result in gameplay_changes[-10:]:  # Last 10
    print(f"  Transition {i}: {action} -> level_completed={result.get('level_completed', False)}, board_changed={result.get('board_changed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the blue circle at the bottom of the right panel
current_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Bottom area (rows 48-63, cols 30-65):")
for r in range(48, 63):
    row_str = current_ascii[r][30:65]
    if 'b' in row_str or 'B' in row_str or 'w' in row_str or 'g' in row_str:
        print(f"  Row {r}: {row_str}")

# Also check the segmentation for the blue circle
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"\nBlue node: id={node['id']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
